name: GLM-4.5 (355B-A32B)
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts, 355B total / 32B active, hybrid thinking/non-thinking response modes
note: MIT-licensed agentic/reasoning/coding (ARC) MoE flagship; ranked 3rd overall and 2nd on agentic benchmarks among evaluated models at launch.
tpsNote: 355B MoE needs multi-GPU (8x H100/H200-class) even at FP8; does not fit a single RTX 4090.

results.notes: BFCL V3 (Full), Table 3 'Results on Agentic Benchmarks' of the GLM-4.5 technical report.
MATH 500 (the taxonomy's '500 competition math problems' benchmark), Table 4 'Results on Reasoning Benchmarks'.
Table 5 'Results on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal-Bench'.
MMLU (EM), Table 6 'Results on Commonly Used General Chat Benchmarks'.

IFBench (instruction-following), independently measured by Artificial Analysis as one component of their live Intelligence Evaluations breakdown for GLM-4.5 (Reasoning); read directly from AA's ranked bar chart (44%, last of 23 models shown on that chart). Not self-reported by Z.ai and not previously tracked for this model -- the corpus's 14 existing results are all either self-reported (arXiv 2508.06471) or independent scores from llm-stats.com (mmlu-pro, gpqa, livecodebench, hle), none of which cover IFBench.

verificationNotes: Existence and identity confirmed via official Z.ai blog (z.ai/blog/glm-4.5), Hugging Face model card (zai-org/GLM-4.5), and arXiv paper 2508.06471. paramsB=355, activeParamsB=32 confirmed on HF card ('355 billion total parameters with 32 billion active'). License MIT confirmed on HF card. Release date 2025-07-28 confirmed via cometapi article citing the WAIC-adjacent launch event. ctxK=128 confirmed via llm-stats comparison page. Self-reported rows (TAU-Bench 70.1, AIME 91.0, SWE-bench 64.2) verbatim-confirmed by fetching arXiv abs page which explicitly states these three numbers. Independent rows (MMLU-Pro 84.6, GPQA 79.1, LiveCodeBench 72.9, HLE 14.4) verbatim-confirmed on llm-stats.com/models/compare/glm-4.5-vs-glm-4.5-air. Pricing ($0.6/$2.2 per 1M tokens) confirmed on docs.z.ai/guides/overview/pricing. No changes made to the original record; all fields checked out.
